    public function smallestNumber($S, $D) {
        if ($S > $D * 9) {
            return '-1' ; 
        }

        $S -= 1 ; 
        $res = pow(10, $D - 1) ; 
        $d = 1 ;

        while ($S > 0) {
            $tmp = min($S, 9) ; 
            $res += $d * $tmp ; 
            $S -= $tmp ; 
            $d *= 10 ; 
        }

        return strval($res) ; 
    }

function hashString($s) {
    $mod = 1e9 + 7;
    $p = 31;
    $curr = 0;
    $p1 = 1;

    for ($i = 0; $i < strlen($s); $i++) {
        $curr = ($curr + $p1 * (ord($s[$i]) - ord('a') + 1)) % $mod;
        $p1 = ($p1 * $p) % $mod;
    }
    return $curr;
}

function countPrefixSuffixPairs($words) {
    $mod = 1e9 + 7;
    $ans = 0;
    $m = [];

    foreach ($words as $x) {
        $h = hashString($x);
        if (isset($m[$h])) {
            $m[$h]++;
        } else {
            $m[$h] = 1;
        }
    }

    for ($i = count($words) - 1; $i >= 0; $i--) {
        $h = hashString($words[$i]);
        if (isset($m[$h]) && $m[$h] > 0) {
            $m[$h]--;
        }

        $c1 = 0; 
        $c2 = 0; 
        $p1 = 1; 
        $p2 = 1; 

        for ($j = 0; $j < strlen($words[$i]); $j++) {
            $c1 = ($c1 + $p1 * (ord($words[$i][$j]) - ord('a') + 1)) % $mod;
            $p1 = ($p1 * 31) % $mod;

            $c2 = ($c2 * 31) % $mod + (ord($words[$i][strlen($words[$i]) - 1 - $j]) - ord('a') + 1) % $mod;
            $c2 = $c2 % $mod;
            $p2 = ($p2 * 31) % $mod;

            if ($c1 == $c2) {
                if (isset($m[$c1])) {
                    $ans += $m[$c1];
                }
            }
        }
    }
    return $ans;
}

	while ($y != 0) {
		$tmp1 = min($x, $y);

		$y = $tmp2;
		$y %= $x;
	}
	return $x;
}

function ans($n) {
    if (($n & ($n + 1)) == 0) {
        $i = 2;
        $l = [];
        while ($i * $i <= $n) {
            if ($n % $i == 0) {
                array_push($l, $i);
                if ($i * $i != $n) {
                    array_push($l, $n / $i);
                }
            }
            $i++;
        }
        array_push($l, 1);
        return max($l);
    } else {
        $bits = 0;
        while ($n > 0) {
            $bits++;
            $n >>= 1;
        }
        return (1 << $bits) - 1;
    }
}

class Solution {

    function numWays($steps, $arrLen) {
        $r = min($arrLen, intval($steps / 2) + 1);
        $dp = array(0, 1); 
        
        for ($t = 0; $t < $steps; $t++) {
            $newDp = array_fill(0, $r + 1, 0);
            for ($i = 1; $i < min($r + 1, $t + 3); $i++) {
                $newDp[$i] = ($dp[$i - 1] + $dp[$i] + ($i < count($dp) - 1 ? $dp[$i + 1] : 0)) % (10 ** 9 + 7);
            }
            $dp = $newDp; 
        }
        
        return $dp[1] % (10 ** 9 + 7);
    }
}

function solve() {
    list($n, $k, $x) = LII();
    $t = reduceXor(range(1, $n));

    if ($t != ($k % 2) * $x) {
        return print("NO\n");
    }

    $vis = array_fill(0, $n + 1, 0);
    $h = [];

    for ($i = 1; $i <= $n; $i++) {
        if ($vis[$i]) continue;

        $t = $x ^ $i;
        if (1 <= $t && $t <= $n && !$vis[$t]) {
            $vis[$i] = 1;
            $vis[$t] = 1;
            $h[] = [$i, $t];
        }
    }

    if (1 <= $x && $x <= $n) {
        $vis[$x] = 1;
        $h[] = [$x];
    }

    $t = [];
    for ($i = 1; $i <= $n; $i++) {
        if (!$vis[$i]) $t[] = $i;
    }

    if ($t && reduceXor($t) == $x) {
        $h[] = $t;
    } else {
        if ($h) $h[count($h) - 1] = array_merge($h[count($h) - 1], $t);
    }

    if (count($h) < $k || (count($h) - $k) % 2) {
        return print("NO\n");
    }

    while (count($h) > $k) {
        $t1 = array_pop($h);
        $t2 = array_pop($h);
        $h[0] = array_merge($h[0], $t1, $t2);
    }

    print("YES\n");
    foreach ($h as $i) {
        print(count($i) . " " . implode(" ", $i) . "\n");
    }
}

function main() {
    $t = 1;
    $t = II();
    for ($i = 0; $i < $t; $i++) {
        solve();
    }
}

function reduceXor($arr) {
    return array_reduce($arr, function($carry, $item) {
        return $carry ^ $item;
    }, 0);
}

class Solution {
    public function isPossible($target) {
        if (empty($target)) {
            return false;
        }

        $sum = 0;
        $q = [];
        foreach ($target as $n) {
            $sum += $n;
            if ($sum > PHP_INT_MAX) {
                return false;
            }
            array_push($q, $n);
        }

        while (!empty($q)) {
            sort($q);
            $cur = array_pop($q);
            if ($cur <= 1) {
                return true;
            }
            if ($cur <= $sum - $cur) {
                return false;
            } else {
                $tmp = $cur;
                $cur = $cur - ($sum - $cur);
                $sum = $tmp;

                if ($cur > 0) {
                    array_push($q, $cur);
                }
            }
            // update sum with new values
            $sum = 0;
            foreach ($q as $val) {
                $sum += $val;
            }
        }
        return true;
    }
}

function is_prime($n) {
    if ($n == 0 || $n == 1) {
        return false;
    }
    $d = 2;
    while ($d * $d <= $n) {
        if ($n % $d == 0) {
            return false;
        }
        $d++;
    }
    return true;
}

class Solution {

$dp = array_fill(0, 100001, -1);

function cmp($n, $k, $m) {
    global $dp;
    $ct = 0;
    if ($n == 0) {
        return 1;
    }
    if ($dp[$n] != -1) {
        return $dp[$n];
    }
    if ($n >= $k) {
        $ct += cmp($n - $k, $k, $m);
        $ct %= $m;
    }
    $ct += cmp($n - 1, $k, $m);
    $ct %= $m;
    $dp[$n] = $ct;
    return $ct;
}

class Solution {
    public function longestDecomposition($text) {
        $result = 0;
        $len = strlen($text);
        $this->p($text, 0, $len, $result, 0);
        return $result;
    }
    
    private function p($text, $from, $to, &$result, $cur) {
        echo "$to $from cur$cur\n";
        if ($from >= $to) {
            $result = max($result, $cur);
        }
        for ($i = $from; $i < $to; $i++) {
            $size = $i - $from + 1;
            $left = substr($text, $from, $size);
            $right = substr($text, $to - $size, $size);
            
            // Debug info
            echo "$left $right cur$cur\n";
            if ($left === $right) {
                if ($from == $to - $size) {
                    $this->p($text, $i + 1, $to - $size, $result, $cur + 1);
                } else {
                    $this->p($text, $i + 1, $to - $size, $result, $cur + 2);
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

define('PRECISION', 1e-08);

function solve($n) {
    $left = $n / 2;
    $right = $n / 2;
    $off = $n / 2;
    $pd = $left * $right;

    while ($pd != $n) {
        $off /= 2;
        $diff = abs($pd - $n);

        if ($diff < PRECISION) {
            if ($left < $right) {
                list($left, $right) = array($right, $left);
            }
            return array($left, $right);
        }

        if ($off <= PRECISION * 0.0001) {
            return array(-1, -1);
        }

        if ($pd > $n) {
            $left -= $off;
            $right += $off;
        } elseif ($pd < $n) {
            $left += $off;
            $right -= $off;
        }

        $pd = $left * $right;
    }

    if ($left < $right) {
        list($left, $right) = array($right, $left);
    }
    return array($left, $right);
}

function driver() {
    $tc = (int)trim(fgets(STDIN));
    for ($i = 0; $i < $tc; $i++) {
        $num = (int)trim(fgets(STDIN));
        list($l, $r) = solve($num);
        if ($l != -1) {
            echo 'Y ' . $l . ' ' . $r . "\n";
        } else {
            echo 'N' . "\n";
        }
    }
}

<?php

define('BUFSIZE', 8192);
$inf = pow(10, 20);
$mod = 998244353;

function inp() {
    return trim(fgets(STDIN));
}

function out($var) {
    fwrite(STDOUT, $var);
}

function sep() {
    return array_map('intval', explode(' ', inp()));
}

function dist($a, $b) {
    return abs($a[0] - $b[0]) + abs($a[1] - $b[1]);
}

function cmp($a, $b) {
    if ($a[0] != $b[0]) {
        return $a[0] < $b[0];
    }
    return $a[1] > $b[1];
}

function multikey_ordersort($order, $seqs) {
    foreach (array_reverse($seqs) as $seq) {
        $order = ordersort($order, $seq);
    }
    return $order;
}

function ordersort($order, $seq) {
    $bit = (int)(log(max($seq)) / log(2)) + 1;
    $mask = (1 << $bit) - 1;

    $buckets = array_fill(0, max($seq) + 1, 0);
    foreach ($seq as $x) {
        $buckets[$x]++;
    }
    for ($i = 1; $i < count($buckets); $i++) {
        $buckets[$i] += $buckets[$i - 1];
    }

    $new_order = array_fill(0, count($seq), -1);
    for ($i = count($order) - 1; $i >= 0; $i--) {
        $x = $seq[$order[$i]];
        $idx = --$buckets[$x];
        $new_order[$idx] = $order[$i];
    }

    return $new_order;
}

function solve($case) {
    $n = (int) inp();
    $hash = [];
    for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
        list($a, $b) = sep();
        if (max($a, $b) in $hash) {
            $hash[max($a, $b)][] = [$a, $b];
        } else {
            $hash[max($a, $b)] = [[$a, $b]];
        }
    }
    
    foreach ($hash as &$value) {
        usort($value, function($x, $y) {
            return $x <=> $y;
        });
    }

    $level = [];
    foreach ($hash as $i => $ff) {
        $ss = $ff[0];
        $ff = $ff[0];
        foreach ($ff as $x) {
            if (cmp($ff, $x)) {
                $ff = $x;
            }
            if (cmp($x, $ss)) {
                $ss = $x;
            }
        }
        $level[$i] = [$ff, $ss];
    }
    $level[0] = [[0, 0], [0, 0]];
    
    $a = [];
    foreach ($level as $i => $value) {
        array_push($a, $i);
    }
    
    $order = multikey_ordersort(range(count($a)), $a);
    $b = [];
    foreach ($order as $i) {
        $b[] = $level[$a[$i]];
    }

    $dp = array_fill(0, 200010, [$inf, $inf]);
    $dp[0][0] = 0;
    $dp[0][1] = 0;

    for ($i = 1; $i < count($a); $i++) {
        $dp[$i][0] = min($dp[$i][0], $dp[$i - 1][0] + dist($b[$i - 1][0], $b[$i][1]) + dist($b[$i][0], $b[$i][1]));
        $dp[$i][0] = min($dp[$i][0], $dp[$i - 1][1] + dist($b[$i - 1][1], $b[$i][1]) + dist($b[$i][0], $b[$i][1]));
        $dp[$i][1] = min($dp[$i][1], $dp[$i - 1][0] + dist($b[$i - 1][0], $b[$i][0]) + dist($b[$i][0], $b[$i][1]));
        $dp[$i][1] = min($dp[$i][1], $dp[$i - 1][1] + dist($b[$i - 1][1], $b[$i][0]) + dist($b[$i][0], $b[$i][1]));
    }

    out(min($dp[count($a) - 1]));
}

function testcase($t) {
    for ($pp = 0; $pp < $t; $pp++) {
        solve($pp);
    }
}

testcase(1);

function treePathSum($root) {
    $l = array(0);
    
    function f($root, $s, &$l) {
        if ($root == null) {
            return;
        }
        
        if ($root->left == null && $root->right == null) {
            $s .= strval($root->data);
            $l[0] += intval($s);
            return;
        }
        
        f($root->left, $s . strval($root->data), $l);
        f($root->right, $s . strval($root->data), $l);
    }
    
    f($root, '', $l);
    return $l[0];
}

class TreeNode {
    public $data;
    public $left;
    public $right;
    
    function __construct($data) {
        $this->data = $data;
        $this->left = null;
        $this->right = null;
    }
}

function get_p($i, &$p) {
    if ($p[$i] == -1 || $p[$i] == $i) {
        return $p[$i] = $i;
    }
    
    $r = get_p($p[$i], $p);
    
    return $p[$i] = $r;
}

function countPairs($n, $edges) {
    $p = array_fill(0, $n, -1);

    foreach ($edges as $e) {
        $x = $e[0];
        $y = $e[1];

        $px = get_p($x, $p);
        $py = get_p($y, $p);

        if ($px != $py) {
            $p[$px] = $py;
        }
    }

    $total = (long) $n * ($n - 1) / 2;
    $mp = [];

    for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
        $root = get_p($i, $p);
        if (!isset($mp[$root])) {
            $mp[$root] = 0;
        }
        $mp[$root]++;
    }

    foreach ($mp as $c) {
        $total -= ($c * ($c - 1) / 2);
    }

    return $total;
}

function bisection($l, $r, $f, $left = true, $discrete = true) {
	$eps = $discrete ? 1 : 10 ** (-8);
	if (($left xor !$f($r))) {
		return $left ? $r : $r + 1;
	} elseif ($left xor $f($l)) {
		return $left ? $l - 1 : $l;
	}
	while ($r - $l > $eps) {
		$h = $discrete ? intdiv($l + $r, 2) : ($l + $r) / 2;
		if (($left xor !$f($h))) {
			$l = $h;
		} else {
			$r = $h;
		}
	}
	return $discrete ? ($left ? $l : $r) : ($l + $r) / 2;
}

function resolve() {
	$n = (int)$input();
	$D = [];
	$line = explode(" ", $input());

	foreach ($line as $a) {
		$D[(int)$a] = (isset($D[(int)$a]) ? $D[(int)$a] : 0) + 1;
	}

	$D = array_values($D);
	sort($D);
	$t = count($D);
	$S = array_fill(0, $t + 1, 0);
	for ($i = 0; $i < $t; $i++) {
		$S[$i + 1] = $S[$i] + $D[$i];
	}
	$k = 0;

	$check = function($t) use ($D, $S, &$k) {
		$i = bisect_left($D, $t);
		$score = $S[$i] + $t * (count($D) - $i);
		return $score >= $k * $t;
	};

	for ($k = 1; $k <= $n; $k++) {
		echo bisection(0, intdiv($n, $k) + 1, $check) . "\n";
	}
}

resolve();

function bisect_left($arr, $x) {
	$low = 0;
	$high = count($arr);
	while ($low < $high) {
		$mid = (int)(($low + $high) / 2);
		if ($arr[$mid] < $x) {
			$low = $mid + 1;
		} else {
			$high = $mid;
		}
	}
	return $low;
}

function shiftString($layout, $string, $shift) {
    $result = '' ;
    for ($i = 0; $i < strlen($string); $i++) {
        $char = $string[$i] ;
        $index = strpos($layout, $char) ;
        if ($index === false) {
            $result .= $char ; // if not found, just append the char
            continue ;
        }
        $newIndex = $index + $shift ;
        if ($newIndex < 0 || $newIndex >= strlen($layout)) {
            $result .= $char ; // out of bounds, append original
            continue ;
        }
        $result .= $layout[$newIndex] ;
    }
    return $result ;
}

class Solution {
    public function beautifulPartitions($s, $k, $minLength) {
        if(!$this->isPrime($s[0]) || $this->isPrime($s[strlen($s) - 1])) {
            return 0;
        }
        $len = strlen($s);
        $canSplitIndex = [];
        
        for($i = 0; $i < $len - 1; $i++) {
            if(!$this->isPrime($s[$i]) && $this->isPrime($s[$i + 1]) && $i + 1 >= $minLength && ($len - ($i + 1)) >= $minLength) {
                $canSplitIndex[] = $i;
            }
        }

        $dict = array_map('intval', $canSplitIndex);
        $lastDict = array_fill(0, count($dict), 0);
        $index = 0;

        for($i = 0; $i < count($dict); $i++) {
            while ($index < count($dict) && ($dict[$i] - $dict[$index]) >= $minLength) {
                $index++;
            }
            $lastDict[$i] = $index;
        }

        if(count($dict) + 1 < $k) {
            return 0;
        }

        $mod = 1000000007;
        $dp = array_fill(0, $k, array_fill(0, count($dict) + 2, 0));
        $dp[0][0] = 1;

        for($i = 0; $i < count($dict); $i++) {
            for($j = min($i + 1, $k - 1); $j >= 0; $j--) {
                if($j > 0) {
                    for($t = 0; $t <= $lastDict[$i]; $t++) {
                        $dp[$j][$i + 1] = ($dp[$j - 1][$t] + $dp[$j][$i + 1]) % $mod;
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        $res = 0;
        for($i = 0; $i <= count($dict) + 1; $i++) {
            $res = ($res + $dp[$k - 1][$i]) % $mod;
        }

        return (int)$res;
    }

    private function isPrime($c) {
        return $c == '2' || $c == '3' || $c == '5' || $c == '7';
    }
}

    $neg = 0;

    for($i = 1; $i <= $n; $i++) {
        if($s[$i] == '+') {
            $pos++;
        } else {
            $neg++;
        }
    }

    $m = intval(trim(fgets(STDIN)));

    while($m--) {
        $input = trim(fgets(STDIN));
        $data2 = explode(' ', $input);
        $a = intval($data2[0]);
        $b = intval($data2[1]);

        if($a < $b) {
            $tmp = $a;
            $a = $b;
            $b = $tmp;
        }

        $l = 0; 
        $r = $pos;

        while($l < $r) {
            $mid = ($l + $r) >> 1;
            $tot = $mid * $a + ($pos - $mid) * $b;

            if($a - $b == 0) {
                $x = 0;
            } else {
                $x = intval(($tot - $a * $neg) / ($b - $a));
            }

            $tot1 = ($b - $a) * $x + $a * $neg;

            if($tot1 <= $tot) {
                $r = $mid;
            } else {
                $l = $mid + 1;
            }
        }

        $tot = $l * $a + ($pos - $l) * $b;

        if($a == $b) {
            $x = 0;
        } else {
            $x = intval(($tot - $a * $neg) / ($b - $a));
        }

        if($x > $neg || $x < 0) {
            echo "NO\n";
            continue;
        }

        if($tot == (($b - $a) * $x + $a * $neg)) {
            echo "YES\n";
        } else {
            echo "NO\n";
        }
    }
}

function sieve($n) {
    if ($n < 2) {
        return array();
    }
    $prime = array_fill(0, $n + 1, true);
    $p = 3;
    while ($p * $p <= $n) {
        if ($prime[$p]) {
            for ($i = $p * 2; $i <= $n; $i += $p) {
                $prime[$i] = false;
            }
        }
        $p += 2;
    }
    $r = array(2);
    for ($p = 3; $p <= $n; $p += 2) {
        if ($prime[$p]) {
            array_push($r, $p);
        }
    }
    return $r;
}

function divs($n, $start = 1) {
    $r = array();
    for ($i = $start; $i <= floor(sqrt($n)); $i++) {
        if ($n % $i == 0) {
            if ($n / $i == $i) {
                array_push($r, $i);
            } else {
                array_push($r, $i, $n / $i);
            }
        }
    }
    return $r;
}

function cdiv($n, $k) {
    return floor($n / $k) + ($n % $k != 0 ? 1 : 0);
}

        return true;
    }
    if ($n % 2 == 0 || $n <= 1) {
        return false;
    }
    $sqr = floor(sqrt($n)) + 1;
    for ($d = 3; $d < $sqr; $d += 2) {
        if ($n % $d == 0) {
            return false;
        }
    }
    return true;
}

function convn($number, $base = 3) {
    $newnumber = '';
    while ($number > 0) {
        $newnumber = strval($number % $base) . $newnumber;
        $number = floor($number / $base);
    }
    return $newnumber;
}

<?php

class MajorityChecker {

    private $pairs;
    private $dic;
    private $dic2;
    private $arr;

    public function __construct($arr) {
        $this->pairs = [0];
        $this->dic = [$arr[0] => 1];
        $this->dic2 = [$arr[0] => [0]];
        $this->arr = $arr;

        for ($i = 1; $i < count($arr); $i++) {
            if (isset($this->dic[$arr[$i]])) {
                $this->pairs[] = $this->dic[$arr[$i]] + end($this->pairs);
                $this->dic[$arr[$i]] += 1;
                $this->dic2[$arr[$i]][] = $i;
            } else {
                $this->pairs[] = end($this->pairs);
                $this->dic[$arr[$i]] = 1;
                $this->dic2[$arr[$i]] = [$i];
            }
        }
    }

    public function query($left, $right, $threshold) {
        if ($left == 0) {
            $total_pairs = $this->pairs[$right];
        } else {
            $total_pairs = $this->pairs[$right] - $this->pairs[$left];
        }
        
        if ($total_pairs < $threshold * ($threshold - 1) / 2) {
            return -1;
        }

        for ($j = 0; $j < 20; $j++) {
            $i = rand($left, $right);
            $a = $this->bisect_left($this->dic2[$this->arr[$i]], $left);
            $b = $this->bisect_right($this->dic2[$this->arr[$i]], $right);
            if (($b - $a) >= $threshold) {
                return $this->arr[$i];
            }
        }

        return -1;
    }

    private function bisect_left($arr, $value) {
        $low = 0;
        $high = count($arr);
        while ($low < $high) {
            $mid = (int)(($low + $high) / 2);
            if ($arr[$mid] < $value) {
                $low = $mid + 1;
            } else {
                $high = $mid;
            }
        }
        return $low;
    }

    private function bisect_right($arr, $value) {
        $low = 0;
        $high = count($arr);
        while ($low < $high) {
            $mid = (int)(($low + $high) / 2);
            if ($arr[$mid] <= $value) {
                $low = $mid + 1;
            } else {
                $high = $mid;
            }
        }
        return $low;
    }
}

$threshold = intval(trim(fgets(STDIN)));

function make_vector($a, $b) {
    return array_fill(0, $a, $b);
}

function assign_vector(&$v, $a, $b) {
    $v = array_fill(0, $a, $b);
}

function square($x) {
    return $x * $x;
}

function gcd($a, $b) {
    while ($a) {
        $tmp = $a;
        $a = $b % $a;
        $b = $tmp;
    }
    return $b;
}

function maxPoints($a) {
    $R = count($a);
    $C = count($a[0]);
    $dp = array_fill(0, $R, make_vector($C, PHP_INT_MIN));
    for ($c = 0; $c < $C; $c++) {
        $dp[0][$c] = $a[0][$c];
    }
    
    $left = make_vector($C, 0);
    $right = make_vector($C, 0);
    $lmax = make_vector($C, 0);
    $rmax = make_vector($C + 1, 0);
    
    for ($r = 1; $r < $R; $r++) {
        for ($i = 0; $i < $C; $i++) {
            $left[$i] = $dp[$r - 1][$i] - ($C - 1 - $i);
            $lmax[$i] = ($i == 0) ? $left[0] : max($lmax[$i - 1], $left[$i]);
        }
        for ($i = $C - 1; $i >= 0; $i--) {
            $right[$i] = $dp[$r - 1][$i] - $i;
            $rmax[$i] = ($i == $C - 1) ? $right[$C - 1] : max($rmax[$i + 1], $right[$i]);
        }
        
        for ($c = 0; $c < $C; $c++) {
            $dp[$r][$c] = $a[$r][$c] + max($lmax[$c] + ($C - 1 - $c), $rmax[$c] + $c);
        }
    }
    return max($dp[$R - 1]);
}

function isPrime($n) {
    if ($n <= 1) {
        return false;
    }
    if ($n <= 3) {
        return true;
    }
    if ($n % 2 == 0 || $n % 3 == 0) {
        return false;
    }
    for ($i = 5; $i * $i <= $n; $i += 6) {
        if ($n % $i == 0 || $n % ($i + 2) == 0) {
            return false;
        }
    }
    return true;
}

        for ($j = 0; $j <= $n / $b; $j++) {
            if ($n - ($i * $a + $j * $b) >= 0 && ($n - ($i * $a + $j * $b)) % $c == 0) {

            }
        }
    }
    pr('NO');
}

class Solution {

    function duplicates($arr, $n) {
        $d = array(); 
        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) { 
            $tmp = $arr[$i]; 
            if (!array_key_exists($tmp, $d)) { 
                $d[$tmp] = 1; 
            } else { 
                $d[$tmp] += 1; 
            }
        }
        
        $d1 = array(); 
        foreach ($d as $key => $value) { 
            if ($value != 1) { 
                $d1[$key] = $value; 
            }
        }

        if (count($d1) > 0) { 
            $result = array_keys($d1); 
            sort($result); 
            return $result; 
        } else { 
            return array(-1); 
        }
    }

}

function calculateMin($X, $M) {
    $MIN = 100000000; 
    $len = $X[1] - $X[0] + 1; 

    for ($i = 0; $i < $len; $i++) {
        $subArray = array_slice($M, $i, $X[0]); 
        $maxVal = max($subArray); 
        $minVal = min($subArray); 
        $diff = $maxVal - $minVal; 
        $MIN = min($MIN, $diff); 

        if ($MIN == 0) {
            return 0; 
        }
    }
    
    return $MIN; 
}

function findMaximumLength($nums) {
    $que = new SplPriorityQueue();
    $tot = 0; 
    $n = count($nums);
    $minn = 0; 
    $dp = array_fill(0, $n, 0);

    for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
        $tot += $nums[$i];
        while (!$que->isEmpty() && $que->top()[0] <= $tot) {
            $minn = min($minn, $que->top()[1]);
            $que->extract();
        }
        $dp[$i] = $tot + $minn;
        $que->insert([$dp[$i] + $tot, -$tot]);
    }

    $u = $n - 1; 
    $ans = 0; 
    $tt = 0; 
    $ttt = 0;

    while ($u >= 0) {
        $tt = $dp[$u];
        $ttt = 0; 
        $ans++; 
        while ($ttt < $tt && $u >= 0) {
            $ttt += $nums[$u--];
        }
    }
    return $ans; 
}

<?php

function getPlots($a, $b) {
    list($ax, $ay) = $a;
    list($bx, $by) = $b;
    if ($ax < $bx) {
        for ($x = $ax; $x <= $bx; $x++) {
            yield array($x, $ay);
        }
    } else {
        for ($x = $ax; $x >= $bx; $x--) {
            yield array($x, $ay);
        }
    }
    if ($ay < $by) {
        for ($y = $ay; $y <= $by; $y++) {
            yield array($bx, $y);
        }
    } else {
        for ($y = $ay; $y >= $by; $y--) {
            yield array($bx, $y);
        }
    }
}

function solve($points) {
    $perms = new \AppendIterator();
    foreach (permute($points) as $p) {
        $perms->append(new \ArrayIterator($p));
    }
    foreach ($perms as $perm) {
        list($a, $b, $c) = $perm;
        list($ax, $ay) = $a;
        list($bx, $by) = $b;
        list($cx, $cy) = $c;
        if (min($ax, $bx) <= $cx && $cx <= max($ax, $bx) && min($ay, $by) <= $cy && $cy <= max($ay, $by)) {
            return array_merge(iterator_to_array(getPlots($a, $c)), iterator_to_array(getPlots($c, $b)), array($b));
        }
    }

    $it = function() use ($points) {
        $perms = new \AppendIterator();
        foreach (permute($points) as $p) {
            $perms->append(new \ArrayIterator($p));
        }
        foreach ($perms as $perm) {
            list($a, $b, $c) = $perm;
            list($ax, $ay) = $a;
            list($bx, $by) = $b;
            $m = array($ax, $by);
            $L = array_merge(iterator_to_array(getPlots($a, $m)), iterator_to_array(getPlots($b, $m)), iterator_to_array(getPlots($c, $m)), array($m));
            yield array(count($L), $L);
        }
    };

    $minLength = PHP_INT_MAX;
    $result = [];
    foreach ($it() as $val) {
        if ($val[0] < $minLength) {
            $minLength = $val[0];
            $result = $val[1];
        }
    }
    return $result;
}

function permute($items) {
    $results = [];
    if (count($items) === 0) {
        return [ [] ];
    }
    foreach ($items as $key => $item) {
        $remaining = $items;
        unset($remaining[$key]);
        foreach (permute($remaining) as $perm) {
            array_unshift($perm, $item);
            $results[] = $perm;
        }
    }
    return $results;
}

$points = [];
for ($i = 0; $i < 3; $i++) {
    $input = trim(fgets(STDIN));
    $points[] = array_map('intval', explode(" ", $input));
}

$res = solve($points);
echo count($res) . "\n";
foreach ($res as $coords) {
    echo $coords[0] . " " . $coords[1] . "\n";
}

class Solution {

    public function maxSubArraySum($arr, $N) {
        $sum = 0 ;
        $k = 0 ;
        
        for ($i = 0; $i < $N; $i++) {
            $sum += $arr[$i] ;
            if ($sum <= 0) {
                $sum = 0 ;
            }
            if ($sum > $k) {
                $k = $sum ;
            }
        }

        if ($k == 0) {
            return $this->findMax($arr, $N) ;
        }
        return $k ;
    }

    private function findMax($arr, $N) {
        $max = $arr[0] ;
        for ($j = 1; $j < $N; $j++) {
            if ($arr[$j] > $max) {
                $max = $arr[$j] ;
            }
        }
        return $max ;
    }

}

class Solution {

    function splitArraySameAverage($A) {
        $ksums = [[]];
        $maxk = intdiv(count($A), 2);
        
        foreach ($A as $a) {
            $new_ksums = [[]];
            for ($k = 1; $k <= min(count($ksums), $maxk); $k++) {
                $current_set = isset($ksums[$k]) ? $ksums[$k] : [];
                $new_set = array_merge($current_set, array_map(fn($x) => $a + $x, $ksums[$k - 1] ?? []));
                $new_ksums[$k] = array_unique($new_set);
            }
            $ksums = array_merge($new_ksums, [$new_ksums]);
        }
        
        $n = count($A);
        $S = array_sum($A);

        for ($k = 1; $k <= min(count($ksums), $maxk); $k++) {
            if ($this->checkAverage($ksums[$k], $n, $k, $S)) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        return false;
    }

    function checkAverage($ks, $n, $k, $S) {
        foreach ($ks as $x) {
            if ($x * ($n - $k) === $k * ($S - $x)) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        return false;
    }
}

function solve() {
    $n = intval(trim(fgets(STDIN)));

    $vis = array_fill(0, $n + 1, false);
    $pri_cnt = range(0, $n);
    
    $pri = [0, 1];

    for ($i = 2; $i <= $n; $i++) {
        if (!$vis[$i]) {
            $pri[] = $i;
            for ($j = $i; $j <= $n; $j += $i) {
                $vis[$j] = true;
                $pri_cnt[$j] -= intval($pri_cnt[$j] / $i);
            }
        }
    }

    $ans = 0;
    $mod = 10 ** 9 + 7;

    $divs = array_fill(0, $n + 1, []);

    for ($i = 2; $i <= $n; $i++) {
        for ($j = $i + $i; $j <= $n; $j += $i) {
            $divs[$j][] = $i;
        }
    }

    for ($a = 1; $a < $n - 1; $a++) {
        $bc = $n - $a;
        $temp = 0;
        $total = $bc - 1;

        foreach ($divs[$bc] as $gcd_bc) {
            $cnt = $pri_cnt[$bc / $gcd_bc] % $mod;
            $temp += $cnt;
            $ans += ($cnt * lcm($a, $gcd_bc)) % $mod;
            $ans %= $mod;
        }

        $ans += $a * (($total - $temp) % $mod);
        $ans %= $mod;
    }

    return $ans;
}

echo solve();

function lcm($a, $b) {
    return ($a * $b) / gcd($a, $b);
}

function gcd($a, $b) {
    while ($b) {
        $temp = $b;
        $b = $a % $b;
        $a = $temp;
    }
    return $a;
}

function topological_sort($nodes, $edges) {
    $visited = array();
    $result = array();

    function dfs($v, &$visited, &$result, $edges) {
        if(!in_array($v, $visited)) {
            $visited[] = $v;
            foreach($edges[$v] as $u) {
                dfs($u, $visited, $result, $edges);
            }
            $result[] = $v;
        }
    }

    foreach($nodes as $s) {
        dfs($s, $visited, $result, $edges);
    }
    return $result;
}

function swap_head_tail($arr) {
	if(count($arr) == 1) {
		return $arr ;
	}
	$n = floor(count($arr) / 2) ;
	
	$res = array_slice($arr, 0, $n) ;
	$res2 = array_slice($arr, -$n) ;
	
	if(count($arr) % 2 == 1) {
		$res = insert_middle($arr, $n, $res) ;
	}
	
	return array_merge($res2, $res) ;
}

function insert_middle($arr, $n, $res) {
	$middle_elem = $arr[$n] ;
	array_unshift($res, $middle_elem) ;
	return $res ;
}

	$input = trim(fgets(STDIN)) ;
	$arr = explode(',', $input) ;
	$arr = array_map('trim', $arr) ;
	
	$result = swap_head_tail($arr) ;
	
	echo implode(',', $result) . "\n" ;
}

class MyHTMLParser {

    function handle_starttag($tag, $attrs) {
        echo 'Start : ' . $tag . "\n";
        foreach ($attrs as $pair) {
            if (count($pair) == 2) {
                echo '-> ' . $pair[0] . ' > ' . $pair[1] . "\n";
            }
        }
    }

    function handle_endtag($tag) {
        echo 'End   : ' . $tag . "\n";
    }

    function handle_startendtag($tag, $attrs) {
        echo 'Empty : ' . $tag . "\n";
        foreach ($attrs as $pair) {
            if (count($pair) == 2) {
                echo '-> ' . $pair[0] . ' > ' . $pair[1] . "\n";
            }
        }
    }

    function parse($data) {
        $tokens = preg_split('/(<[^>]+>)/', $data, -1, PREG_SPLIT_DELIM_CAPTURE | PREG_SPLIT_NO_EMPTY);
        foreach ($tokens as $token) {
            $token = trim($token);
            if (empty($token)) continue;

            if (preg_match('/^<(\w+)([^>]*)>/', $token, $matches)) {
                $tag = $matches[1];
                $attrsString = isset($matches[2]) ? $matches[2] : '';
                $attrs = $this->parse_attributes($attrsString);
                $this->handle_starttag($tag, $attrs);
            } elseif (preg_match('/^<\/(\w+)>/', $token, $matches)) {
                $tag = $matches[1];
                $this->handle_endtag($tag);
            } elseif (preg_match('/^<(\w+)([^>]*)\/>/', $token, $matches)) {
                $tag = $matches[1];
                $attrsString = isset($matches[2]) ? $matches[2] : '';
                $attrs = $this->parse_attributes($attrsString);
                $this->handle_startendtag($tag, $attrs);
            }
        }
    }

    function parse_attributes($attrString) {
        $attrString = trim($attrString);
        preg_match_all('/(\w+)=["\']?([^"\'>\s]+)["\']?/', $attrString, $matches, PREG_SET_ORDER);
        $attrs = [];
        foreach ($matches as $attr) {
            $attrs[] = [$attr[1], $attr[2]];
        }
        return $attrs;
    }
}

    $input .= $line;
}

class Solution {

    private $hmap;

    public function LCSof3($A, $B, $C, $n1, $n2, $n3) {
        $this->hmap = [];
        $result = $this->rec(0, 0, 0, $A, $B, $C, $n1, $n2, $n3);
        return $result;
    }

    private function rec($i, $j, $k, $A, $B, $C, $n1, $n2, $n3) {
        if ( isset($this->hmap["$i,$j,$k"]) ) {
            return $this->hmap["$i,$j,$k"];
        }
        if ($i == $n1 || $j == $n2 || $k == $n3) {
            return 0;
        }
        
        if ($A[$i] == $B[$j] && $B[$j] == $C[$k]) {
            $this->hmap["$i,$j,$k"] = 1 + $this->rec($i + 1, $j + 1, $k + 1, $A, $B, $C, $n1, $n2, $n3);
        } else {
            $tmp1 = $this->rec($i + 1, $j, $k, $A, $B, $C, $n1, $n2, $n3);
            $tmp2 = $this->rec($i, $j + 1, $k, $A, $B, $C, $n1, $n2, $n3);
            $tmp3 = $this->rec($i, $j, $k + 1, $A, $B, $C, $n1, $n2, $n3);
            $this->hmap["$i,$j,$k"] = max($tmp1, $tmp2, $tmp3);
        }
        return $this->hmap["$i,$j,$k"];
    }
}
